post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Tobacco exclusion: does not apply to firefighters with history of tobacco use for cardiovascular or lung conditions. Annual medical exam required for each of first 7 years. Firefighter must hold at minimum Fire Fighter I certification. Presumption may be rebutted by preponderance including tobacco use, fitness, lifestyle, hereditary factors, and other exposures. Covers firefighters under AS 23.30.243 (WC-covered fire fighters).

condition_specific: Cardiovascular events experienced within 72 hours after exposure to smoke, fumes, or toxic substances
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Event must occur within 72 hours after exposure to smoke, fumes, or toxic substances. Tobacco exclusion applies. Annual medical exam required for each of first 7 years. Fire Fighter I certification required. Presumption rebutted by preponderance.

condition_specific: Primary brain cancer, malignant melanoma, leukemia, non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, bladder cancer, ureter cancer, kidney cancer, prostate cancer, breast cancer
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Firefighter must demonstrate exposure to a known IARC or NTP carcinogen associated with the disabling cancer. Annual medical exam required for each of first 7 years. Fire Fighter I certification required. Presumption covers paid and registered volunteer firefighters.

post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: 'Fire fighter' defined to include members of volunteer fire departments registered with state fire marshal or registered for WC purposes. Same terms and conditions as career firefighters.

condition_specific: Cardiovascular events experienced within 72 hours after exposure to smoke, fumes, or toxic substances
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Volunteer firefighters registered with state fire marshal or for WC. Same terms as career firefighters.

condition_specific: Primary brain cancer, malignant melanoma, leukemia, non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, bladder cancer, ureter cancer, kidney cancer, prostate cancer, breast cancer
post_termination_formula: 3 calendar months per year of requisite service, max 60 months
notes: Volunteer firefighters registered with state fire marshal or for WC. Same terms as career firefighters. Carcinogen exposure demonstration required.
